What's up everyone? Welcome to just the gym launch training area for sales. Alright, so what we're going to be covering is how to sell fitness and how to sell challenges specifically. And just so you kind of have a little back story on how this, all this knowledge kind of came to be. This is sort of the culmination of four years of study and probably more relevant. I did a 6,101 call to that I did over that four year period and how I kind of developed our whole sales process. So mostly it was around banging my head against the wall and having things that didn't work. That's why I finally figured out things that started to work. And then as Garrett J. White likes to say, we did it so many times that we sucked and then we sucked less and then we sucked so little that we were actually good at it. And so what we're going to do is basically walk you through the process of how we approach sales and how we approach the consultation and how we naturally lead the prospect through kind of like a discovery process of just asking questions that makes the natural conclusion for them to work with us. And so, you know, really excited to show you all this stuff and we're going to get right to it. Alright, thank you so much.
